formName: Step 3 - Technical Information - Well Information Detail - Technical Information
formDescription: This section collects specific data for an individual well, including identification numbers, physical dimensions, geographic coordinates, and operational status (such as artesian flow or wellhead configuration).

WellIdentification.title: Common Well Name:
WellIdentification.description: A descriptive name used to identify the specific well on the property.

WorksStatus.title: Status
WorksStatus.description: The current construction status of the well works. If not fully constructed, details must be provided in the comments.

WellTagNumber.title: Well Tag Number:
WellTagNumber.description: The provincial registration number for the well, which can be found in the provincial Wells Database.

WellIDPlateNumber.title: Well ID Plate Number:
WellIDPlateNumber.description: The number found on the physical identification plate attached to the well casing.

DepthOfWell.title: Depth of well:
DepthOfWell.description: Total vertical depth of the well from the ground surface.

DepthOfWellUnits.title: Depth Units
DepthOfWellUnits.description: Unit of measurement for the well depth.

MethodOfLocationMeasurement.title: Method of location measurement:
MethodOfLocationMeasurement.description: The tool or service used to determine the geographic coordinates of the well.

OtherMethodOfLocationMeasurement.title: Other method of location measurement (please specify):
OtherMethodOfLocationMeasurement.description: Specify the alternative tool or service used to determine the geographic coordinates of the well.

FlowingArtesianWell.title: Is the well a flowing artesian well at any time of the year?
FlowingArtesianWell.description: Indicates if water naturally rises above the top of the well casing without pumping.

WellHeadInAPitOrSump.title: Is the well head in a pit or sump?
WellHeadInAPitOrSump.description: Identifies if the top of the well is located within a sub-surface enclosure.

OtherUnusedWellsOnTheProperty.title: Are there other wells on the property that are not in use?
OtherUnusedWellsOnTheProperty.description: Indicates the presence of abandoned or dormant wells on the same property.

ConstructionReportUpload.title: Upload Well Construction Report
ConstructionReportUpload.description: Electronic upload of the official construction report document, if available.

Comments.title: Comments
Comments.description: Additional information related to the well(s). Avoid including personal information where possible.
